notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Isaac Paredes
notableEvents.detail: Bot 8 · Isaac Paredes singles on a ground ball to pitcher Rico Garcia. Isaac Paredes to 2nd. Isaac Paredes advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Rico Garcia.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Ceddanne Rafaela
notableEvents.detail: Bot 3 · Ceddanne Rafaela reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Jeremiah Jackson.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Jonny DeLuca
notableEvents.detail: Top 1 · Jonny DeLuca singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jarren Duran. Junior Caminero scores. Ryan Vilade scores. Cedric Mullins to 3rd. Jonny DeLuca to 2nd. Throwing error by left fielder Jarren Duran.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Tristan Gray
notableEvents.detail: Top 3 · Tristan Gray reaches on a fielder's choice. Luke Keaschall to 3rd. Luke Keaschall advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by first baseman Michael Busch.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Edouard Julien
notableEvents.detail: Bot 3 · Edouard Julien reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Elly De La Cruz.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Ke'Bryan Hayes
notableEvents.detail: Top 7 · Ke'Bryan Hayes reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Ezequiel Tovar. Ke'Bryan Hayes to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Gabriel Moreno
notableEvents.detail: Bot 6 · Shea Langeliers challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Gabriel Moreno called out on strikes. Geraldo Perdomo to 3rd. Geraldo Perdomo steals (16) 2nd base. Geraldo Perdomo to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Shea Langeliers.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Paul Goldschmidt
notableEvents.detail: Bot 1 · Paul Goldschmidt reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Nick Gonzales. Ben Rice scores. Paul Goldschmidt to 2nd. Fielding error by third baseman Nick Gonzales. Throwing error by left fielder Bryan Reynolds.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Salvador Perez
notableEvents.detail: Bot 6 · Salvador Perez reaches on a fielder's choice. Lane Thomas scores. Vinnie Pasquantino to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Xander Bogaerts.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Tyler Tolbert
notableEvents.detail: Bot 4 · Padres challenged (force play), call on the field was upheld: Tyler Tolbert reaches on a fielder's choice. Josh Rojas to 2nd. Josh Rojas advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Manny Machado.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Randy Arozarena
notableEvents.detail: Bot 4 · Randy Arozarena reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Casey Schmitt. Randy Arozarena to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Jung Hoo Lee
notableEvents.detail: Top 6 · Jung Hoo Lee grounds into a force out, first baseman Josh Naylor to shortstop Colt Emerson. Heliot Ramos out at 2nd. Jung Hoo Lee advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Colt Emerson.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Carlos Narváez
notableEvents.detail: Bot 6 · Carlos Narváez singles on a soft bunt ground ball to catcher Nick Fortes. Romy Gonzalez scores. Jarren Duran to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Nick Fortes.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Romy Gonzalez
notableEvents.detail: Bot 2 · Romy Gonzalez strikes out swinging. Caleb Durbin to 3rd. Caleb Durbin steals (11) 2nd base. Caleb Durbin to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Hunter Feduccia.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Randal Grichuk
notableEvents.detail: Top 7 · Blue Jays challenged (force play), call on the field was upheld: Randal Grichuk reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Kazuma Okamoto. Miguel Vargas to 3rd. Colson Montgomery to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman Kazuma Okamoto.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Nick Fortes
notableEvents.detail: Top 5 · Nick Fortes singles on a ground ball to third baseman Kazuma Okamoto. Nick Fortes to 2nd. Nick Fortes advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Kazuma Okamoto.
